name: RXO, Inc.
summary: . Company Overview RXO, Inc. (RXO, the Company or we) is a brokered transportation platform defined by cutting-edge technology and an asset-light business model. The largest component is our core truck brokerage business. Our operations also include asset-light managed transportation and last mile services, which complement our truck brokerage business.
